chapter_title.en: The Reward of Voluntary Prayers During the Time of Heedlessness

parts.text: 1567 - وَ رَوَى سَمَاعَةُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

text: : «يَجُوزُ صَدَقَةُ اَلْغُلاَمِ وَ عِتْقُهُ وَ يَؤُمُّ اَلنَّاسَ إِذَا كَانَ لَهُ عَشْرُ سِنِينَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1567 - Sama’a bin Mehran narrated from Imam (as) that He said:
"The charity given by a boy, his emancipation (freeing a slave), and leading people in prayer are permissible if he is ten years old."
